nasb.text: The people were still sacrificing on the high places, because there was no house built for the name of the Lord until those days.

esv.text: The people were sacrificing at the high places, however, because no house had yet been built for the name of the Lord.

cnv.text: 不過在那些日子，人民仍然在邱壇上獻祭，因為還沒有為耶和華的名建造殿宇。

ccb.text: 那时候，用来尊崇耶和华之名的殿还没有建成，以色列人仍然在丘坛献祭。
